title: Record type is an AppleScript enum, not a string
mitigation: Validate record_type enum tokens before AppleScript dispatch and avoid string comparisons against the type property.

title: Database UUID search scopes must resolve to the incoming group
mitigation: When a database UUID is supplied as a search scope, resolve the database incoming group and search inside that group.

title: Tag lookup has AND semantics
mitigation: For OR semantics, query one tag at a time and deduplicate records by UUID.

title: Labels are numeric colors, not workflow tags
mitigation: Use tags or comments for textual states such as TODO; use label only for DEVONthink color labels 0-7.

title: get links is not supported for markdown and plain text records
mitigation: Use native incoming/outgoing references when available and degrade to explicit item-link or wikilink text scanning for markdown/txt.

title: Duplicate command requires the record keyword
mitigation: Use duplicate record theRecord to destinationGroup after resolving both objects.

title: Text-only RTFD creation may downgrade to RTF
mitigation: Return actual_type and warn when DEVONthink creates an RTF record because no package attachment data was provided.

title: Full link-analysis mode is too expensive for loops
mitigation: Default to authoritative mode for batch traversal and reserve full mode for explicit content-derived signal requests.
